name: Dispute Transaction
description: Multi-agent system for credit/debit card transaction dispute resolution with channel-specific routing, intelligent validation, and reason-specific workflows

DisputeTransaction_Supervisor.description: Multi-agent orchestrator for credit/debit card transaction dispute resolution

Dispute.description: Complete end-to-end dispute processing: intake, card/transaction selection, probing validation, information collection, and confirmation

Agent_Transfer.description: Transfers customers to human agents when automated assistance is not sufficient

Feedback_Agent.description: Collects customer feedback about their experience with the dispute resolution process
